flags.help: Output format: json, plain, or tsv.
flags.name: format

flags.help: Shorthand for --format=json.
flags.name: json

flags.help: Disable colored output.
flags.name: no-color

flags.help: Maximum items to return for list operations.
flags.name: limit

flags.help: Comma-separated dot-path field projection, e.g. productCode,name.
flags.name: select

flags.help: Terser output (default).
flags.name: concise

flags.help: Richer output.
flags.name: detailed

flags.help: Fence untrusted target text with markers (default on).
flags.name: wrap-untrusted

flags.help: Permit state-changing operations (no-op: vabc is read-only).
flags.name: allow-mutations

flags.help: Print intended mutations without performing them (no-op: vabc is read-only).
flags.name: dry-run

flags.help: Assume yes for confirmations (no-op: vabc is read-only).
flags.name: yes

flags.help: Bypass safety checks (no-op: vabc is read-only).
flags.name: force

flags.help: Never prompt; fail with exit 13 instead.
flags.name: no-input

flags.help: Wait out throttle/backoff instead of failing fast.
flags.name: wait

flags.help: Maximum time to wait when --wait is set.
flags.name: max-wait
